title: cleidion sessile
intro: Cleidion sessile, a shrub-like plant native to Australia and New Zealand, is a member of the family Rutaceae, commonly known as the citrus family. Its leaves and roots have been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing. Cleidion sessile can be prepared as a herbal remedy through various methods, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
